---
title: "Lessons"
---

# Lessons

Quarto lessons combine prose explanation, math, and executable R code. Each lesson maps to one or more wiki pages and links to related coding dojo drills.

## Unit 1: Foundations

| Lesson | CPS Tier | Key Constructs |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| [Sampling Distributions](foundations/sampling-distributions.qmd) | Construct | CLT, normal, t, χ², F |
| [Standard Error](foundations/standard-error.qmd) | Construct | SE master table, all contexts |
| [Confidence Intervals](foundations/confidence-intervals.qmd) | Procedure | Z and t intervals, CI on σ² |

## Unit 2: Inference

| Lesson | CPS Tier | Key Constructs |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| [Hypothesis Testing](inference/hypothesis-testing.qmd) | Procedure | 7-step framework, Type I/II error |
| [One- and Two-Sample t-Tests](inference/t-tests.qmd) | Procedure | Pooled t, Welch t, paired t |
| [One-Way ANOVA](inference/anova.qmd) | Procedure | F-test, Fisher LSD |

## Unit 3: Regression

| Lesson | CPS Tier | Key Constructs |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| [Simple Linear Regression](regression/simple-linear-regression.qmd) | Procedure | LS estimates, SS decomposition, R² |
| [Multiple Regression](regression/multiple-regression.qmd) | Procedure | MLR model, adjusted R², interaction terms |
| [Model Diagnostics](regression/diagnostics.qmd) | Script | Residual plots, normality, Cook's D |

## Unit 4: Quality Methods

| Lesson | CPS Tier | Key Constructs |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| [Control Chart Concepts](quality-methods/control-charts.qmd) | Procedure | σ̂, control limits, run rules |
| [X̄/R and X̄/S Charts](quality-methods/xbar-r-charts.qmd) | Script | Variables charts, revising limits, Cp/Cpk |
| [p, c, and u Charts](quality-methods/p-c-u-charts.qmd) | Script | Attribute charts, variable sample sizes |

## Unit 5: Experimental Design

| Lesson | CPS Tier | Key Constructs |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| [CRD and One-Way ANOVA](experimental-design/crd-anova.qmd) | Procedure | ANOVA table, Fisher LSD, blocking |
| [Factorial ANOVA](experimental-design/factorial-design.qmd) | Procedure | Main effects, interaction, 3× SD rule |
| [2^k Factorial Design](experimental-design/two-k-design.qmd) | Procedure | ±1 coding, effects, Lenth's PSE, Daniel plot |
